name: Daru
description: A black cat owned by Miyu. Daru was bought by Miyu's mother for Miyu when she was young. At first she didn't like the cat but eventually developed feelings. When she moved out of her mother's house she brought the cat with her.

name: Epel Felmier
description: A first-year student in Pomefiore. Epel is a pretty boy sometimes confused as a girl. Though he looks pretty and nice, he is harsh and is actually a country boy.

name: Fuu Hououji
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'1") __Status:__ Magic Knight, Pillar __Grade:__ 8th Grade The voice of reason. She is also highly intelligent, though this goes more for book smarts than street smarts. She often has moments where she doubts herself but ends up coming out strong in the end. She is also in love with Ferio. She is the Magic Knight of Wind.

name: Fuuko Taki
description: Yuni's classmate. Despite having never spoken to Yuni before, she knows about Yuni's secret social network account.

name: Godot
description: The blacksmith who makes and repairs Guts' sword.

name: Heidi
description: Heidi is an orphan who lived with her aunt until she was 5 years old. When her aunt finds a good job which would not leave her the time to take care of a child, she decides to let Heidi live with her grandfather.
mediaTitles: Alps no Roujin Heidi no Ojii-san
searchTerms: Alps no Roujin Heidi no Ojii-san

name: Kagari Shiina
description: ~!Adopted daughter of Shiina Mayuri from the year 2036. She travels with Suzuha Amane in the time machine back to 1998 and is separated, causing her to be 22 years old in 2010. She's found with amnesia.!~
mediaTitles: Steins;Gate 0: Valentine's of Crystal Polymorphism -Bittersweet Intermedio-
searchTerms: Steins;Gate 0: Valentine's of Crystal Polymorphism -Bittersweet Intermedio-

name: Kamui
description: Kamui is calm yet ruthless, having no mercy for humans or other creatures, he does not care about their feelings, comparing them to mere insects. Though, he tends to often let his opponents choose the death of their preference, and always gives them ten seconds to decide.

name: Kanako Oono
description: Raised in the United States since the third grade, she graduated from an American high school, joining the Genshiken at the beginning of the Fall term. Normally soft-spoken and easily embarrassed, Oono is surprisingly upfront when it comes to one of her two main passions: cosplay. With a nice figure and large bosom, Oono and her cosplaying (using costumes sewn personally by Tanaka, whom she begins dating) quickly become Genshiken's main attraction at student fairs. Oono's other main passion is y

name: Kouta Mizuhara
description: Kota Mizuhara is a second year student at Tokise High School and a member of the Tokise High School Koto Club.
mediaTitles: Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life
Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life Season 2
searchTerms: Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life
Kono Oto Tomare!: Sounds of Life Season 2

name: Koyuki Hinashi
description: An up and coming idol whose CD "reached the top of the charts in just one week." She is a childhood friend of Yuu. She calls Yuu "Niko-kun" and he refers to her as "Tama-chan." Fuuka is a big fan of her music, to the extent that listening to one of her songs makes her emotional enough to cry. One of Koyuki's songs was used as the theme for a popular movie ("Half & Half," a clever reference to another manga by the same mangaka.) Though his sisters tease him that she would never respond to him if

name: L-ELF Karlstein
nativeName: エルエルフ・カルルスタイン
description: __Height:__ 177 cm A secret agent of the Dorssian military, he is a capable strategist (seen from his strategy D7 in episode 3) and good in combat. His name means L11 in German. ~!He is currently considered a traitor by Dorssia due to the actions Haruto committed while in control of his body. L-elf is nick named by ARUS as the "one-man-Army" for having took on 5000 soldiers alone. In episode 3, he tries to recruit Haruto in order to bring about a revolution in Dorssia.!~

name: Lev Leps
description: Air force first lieutenant. Since he had longed to fly since childhood, he applied as an astronaut cadet. Has a strong sense of justice and tends to go against unreasonable things.

name: Lily
description: An overworked succubus. Despite her impersonal approach to her job, she ends up taking a liking to [Kuroki](https://anilist.co/character/144667/Tsutomu-Kuroki) and becomes emotionally invested in their relationship. According to [Shet](https://anilist.co/character/158806/Shet), she has terrible taste in clothes.

name: Mafuyu Kurosaki
description: __Birthday:__ December 21 Former Bancho and co-founder of the Disciplinary Club, she dreams of living a fairy-tale like life of romance and a stereotypical happy school life. Will her instinctive ability to acquire the loyalty of delinquents and her irrepressible need to help people in trouble destroy her dreams? or will she find the love she's looking for in unexpected places? ~!Natsuo is the name Mafuyu uses in disguise. After defeating the high school's current banchou, Kyoutaro, Natsuo takes

name: Mairu Orihara
description: Mairu is one of Izaya's younger sisters. She has a twin named Kururi. Like her brother, she's a troublemaker at school and introduces herself as liking to read encyclopedias, manga, and adult magazines. She also declares that she is bisexual and is looking for girls who are interested. This causes a stir in the class and she is bullied briefly until she responds to one of the bullies by threatening her with thumbtacks as well as taking her to the bathroom and stealing her bra. Later, the sisters

name: Makoto Tsukauchi
description: __Quirk:__ Polygraph Makoto Tsukauchi is Naomasa Tsukauchi's younger sister and a senior college student. She has a strong resemblance to her brother. Makoto is an intelligent, independent and studious woman who possess a strong determination towards her goals. She is generally kind and pleasant, but always knows how to get her way and isn't afraid to do some slightly underhanded methods to reach them. She appears to be popular and quite social, and generally gets along with just about anyone sh

name: Momoshiki Ootsutsuki
description: Momoshiki Ōtsutsuki was a member of the Ootsutsuki clan and the main antagonist in Boruto: Naruto the Movie.

name: Mutsumi Mitsuba
description: A member from the judo club. She is the one who approached Tsuda to ask to create a judo club and is very passionate about judo. She has an innocent way of thinking. She listens to the student council president, Shino and it's shown that she also looks up to her. She is hinted to have feelings for Tsuda.

name: Nao Midorikawa
description: She is a plucky girl with a strong sense of justice, and has no tolerance for wrongdoers. A great elder sister-type, she is popular even with the girls. While tough, she also has a girly side, as she loves cute things. Excellent at sports, she is part of the girls' soccer team.
mediaTitles: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
searchTerms: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories

name: Nao Toramaru
description: One of the three members of the special recommendation group in JCC Transfer Exam. She wears a school uniform and has a Sakamoto keychain attached to her bag. She is an otaku and a hardcore Sakamoto fan. Toramaru's weapon of choice is a combination of a gun and an axe, making her deadly from any distance.

name: Nira
description: Nira, better known as Nira-chan, is one of the frequent characters that appear in ZUTOMAYO's music videos. She made her major debut in the music video STUDY ME. ~! In the music video, Mune no Kemuri, she appears as a bird alternative of herself named Torinira. !~
